_.discard_changes_explain: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to discard them and leave the screen?
_.storage_is_encrypted: Your storage is encrypted. Password is required to decrypt it.
_.qr_custom_input_button: Tap 10 times to enter custom input
azteco.errorBeforeRefeem: Before redeeming, you must first add a Bitcoin wallet.
azteco.errorSomething: Something went wrong. Is this voucher still valid?
azteco.successMessage: Voucher redeemed successfully! Your funds should arrive in your Bitcoin wallet shortly.
azteco.title: Redeem Azte.co voucher
entropy.title: Entropy
lnd.refill_create: In order to proceed, please create a Bitcoin wallet to refill with.
lnd.sameWalletAsInvoiceError: You cannot pay an invoice with the same wallet used to create it.
lnd.title: Manage Funds
lndViewInvoice.wasnt_paid_and_expired: This invoice was not paid and has expired.
lndViewInvoice.refund_deferred: Funds aren't refundable yet. Try again after the swap timelock expires.
lndViewInvoice.notification_claim_body: {walletLabel}: tap to claim your incoming Lightning payment.
lndViewInvoice.notification_refund_body: {walletLabel}: tap to refund your stuck Lightning payment.
receive.bip47_explanation: Payment codes are a universal address that avoids disclosing your wallet addresses. Not all services will support them.
transactions.cancel_explain: We will replace this transaction with one that pays you and has higher fees. This effectively cancels the current transaction. This is called RBF—Replace by Fee.
transactions.transaction_loading_error: There was an issue loading the transaction. Please try again later.
transactions.cpfp_exp: We will create another transaction that spends your unconfirmed transaction. The total fee will be higher than the original transaction fee, so it should be mined faster. This is called CPFP—Child Pays for Parent.
transactions.enable_offline_signing: This wallet is not being used in conjunction with an offline signing. Would you wish to enable it now?
transactions.open_url_error: Unable to open the link with the default browser. Please change your default browser and try again.
transactions.rbf_explain: We will replace this transaction with one with a higher fee so that it will be mined faster. This is called RBF—Replace by Fee.
transactions.watchOnlyWarningDescription: Be cautious of scammers who often use “watch-only” wallets to deceive users. These wallets do not allow you to control or send funds; they only let you view the balance.
transactions.custom_fee_warning_descript: Fees below 1 sat/vB are valid, but may not be relayed due to node policies.
notifications.would_you_like_to_receive_: Would you like to receive notifications when you get incoming payments?
notifications.no_and_dont_ask: No, and do not ask me again.
notifications.permission_denied_message: You have denied permission to send you notifications. If you would like to receive notifications, please enable them in your device settings.
total_balance_view.title: Total Balance
total_balance_view.explanation: View the total balance of all your wallets in the overview screen.
is_it_my_address.title: Is it my address?
is_it_my_address.no_wallet_owns_address: None of the available wallets own the provided address.
autofill_word.title: Seed final word
autofill_word.error: The input is not an 11- or 23-word partial mnemonic. Please try again.
cc.empty: This wallet does not have any coins at the moment.
cc.tip: This feature allows you to see, label, freeze or select coins for improved wallet management. You can select multiple coins by tapping on the colored circles.
